CustomField.formula:
OR( ISPICKVAL(Risk_Status__c, "Mitigated"), ISPICKVAL(Risk_Status__c, "Entitlement Expired"), ISPICKVAL(Risk_Status__c, "Entitlement Churn"), ISPICKVAL(Risk_Status__c, "Account Churn"), ISPICKVAL(Risk_Status__c, "Lost"), ISPICKVAL(Risk_Status__c, "At Risk"), ISPICKVAL(Risk_Status__c, "Partially Mitigated"), ISPICKVAL(Risk_Status__c, "Downsell"), ISPICKVAL(Risk_Status__c, "CX health score improved"), ISPICKVAL(Risk_Status__c, "No Risk"), ISPICKVAL(Risk_Status__c, "Invalid"), ISPICKVAL(Risk_Status__c, "Requires modification of CX Score Logic"), ISPICKVAL(Risk_Status__c, "No mitigation possible"), ISPICKVAL(Risk_Status__c, "Less time to mitigate")
)
CustomField.label: IsClosed
